description: Purchase invoice from supplier — extract billing and line-item fields

fields.name: supplier_name
fields.prompt: Extract the supplier company name (the business that issued this invoice).

fields.name: supplier_address
fields.prompt: Extract the supplier full postal address. Return null if not present.

fields.name: invoice_date
fields.prompt: Extract the invoice issue date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Return null if not found.

fields.name: due_date
fields.prompt: Extract the payment due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Return null if not present.

fields.name: currency
fields.prompt: Extract the 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR). Infer from symbols if explicit code is absent.

fields.name: subtotal
fields.prompt: Extract the subtotal amount (before VAT/tax) as a plain number. Return null if not shown.

fields.name: vat_amount
fields.prompt: Extract the VAT or tax amount as a plain number. Return 0 if explicitly zero; null if not present.

fields.name: total_amount
fields.prompt: Extract the total invoice amount including all taxes as a plain number.

fields.name: line_items
fields.prompt: Extract all line items as a JSON array. Each item: {description, quantity, unit_price, amount, vat_rate}. Use null for missing numeric fields.
